groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #6.

sentences.text: He sketched the outline of the destroyed tank in his field journal while waiting for the convoy.

He sketched the outline of the destroyed tank in his field journal while waiting for the convoy. Suspension upgrades allow the tank to traverse rough terrain at higher speeds without excessive crew fatigue.

Suspension upgrades allow the tank to traverse rough terrain at higher speeds without excessive crew fatigue. I built a scale model tank over the weekend and it turned out way better than I expected. The depleted uranium armor package on the latest variant gives the tank unmatched frontal protection.

A crater in the road forced the tank to detour through the adjacent wheat field toward the bridge.
